title: Automations on import or batch operations
excerpt: I came across this while trying to import over 1000 records to a board. the receiving board had a couple of automations to connect to another board and show mirror columns. But I found every 30 or so records the connect …

posts.author: dickeve (Dick Eve)
posts.cookedHtml: I came across this while trying to import over 1000 records to a board. the receiving board had a couple of automations to connect to another board and show mirror columns. But I found every 30 or so records the connect didnt complete. This was random. I found exactly the same happened on any batch action such as Move. Eventually Monday.com admitted what I suspected in that the batch action only allows certain time for automations and basically it skipped them. This is a major issue for anyone using batch operations with automations… BEWARE. I found no documentation with such a warning !! It needs fixing!!
